content.en:
Nine Extremes Void.

Ye Tian was also looking at the various resources sold by the other members of the Nine Extremes Alliance that would help the Eternal Dao Body.

Nine Lives Xuancao, which helps the eternal Dao body to transform into a realm of less than three percent, one plant 300 Nine Pole Points

Xuanyang Ancient Liquid, which helps the Eternal Dao Body to transform into a realm of less than sixty percent, a drop of 500 Nine Pole Points

Immortal ancient dragon wood, help eternity to the realm of Taoism below ninety, one cubic 3000 nine pole points

Ye Tian looked at these resources and was also shocked by their prices.

These resources are too expensive, and he can't exchange them at all!

"Gotta find a way to earn points!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After a period of time, Ye Tian synthesized an Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, and it was of high quality, and it was acquired by members of the Nine Extremes Alliance.

【Aries】

Ye Tian contacted this member, because the other party purchased a high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, five hundred and nine pole points.

Airplanes!

The will of the two met in the Nine Extremes Void.

"Brother Aries, I have a high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item in my hand, do you want it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" said Aries immediately.

"When is the transaction?" Ye Tian asked.

"Trade at any time. "

Aries said directly.

Immediately, they discussed the location of the transaction, and then went to the meeting.

It didn't take long.

They met in an area of the Ancient Realm and traded high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items face-to-face.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained 500 Nine Pole Points.

"Buy a drop of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid and try it first. "

Ye Tian purchased a drop of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid from another member.

It is also a face-to-face transaction, so that the authenticity of the treasure can also be identified.

Soon, the transaction was completed, and a drop of Xuanyang ancient liquid was in hand.

......

"Try the effect of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid!"

Ye Tian refined this drop of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid, and the Eternal Dao Body Transformation really improved rapidly.

However, after a period of time, this drop of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid was exhausted, and the Eternal Dao Body Transformation was only raised from a trace to a single realm.

"500 Nine Pole Points is like this, how many Nine Pole Points do you need to buy enough resources to completely complete my Eternal Dao Body. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, his Eternal Dao Body Transformation is the Eternal Dao Body Transformation of the Perfect Eternal Dao Species, and the Eternal Dao Body Transformation is naturally more difficult.

In the following million Dao Era years, Ye Tian successively traded two Eternal Sequence Dao Rule items, and purchased two drops of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid, but the result was only to raise the Eternal Dao Body to a little more than two points of realm, not even a three-point realm.

"I need a large amount of Xuanyang Ancient Liquid, just relying on the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, I can't trade enough Nine Pole Points at all, and there are no members to buy the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items!"

Ye Tian was ready to use other methods to obtain Nine Pole Points.

For example, many members of the Nine Poles Alliance are buying some precious things, and if they find them, they can get a large number of Nine Pole Points from them.

For example, the lord of the ancient kingdom has been acquiring a resource called Liuhu gold, and it is a large number of acquisitions, a piece of Liuhu gold, you can get 2000 nine pole points from the lord of the ancient kingdom, which shows how desperate the lord of the ancient kingdom is for the gold of Liuhu.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian was inquiring where there was Liuhu Jin, and just as he was inquiring, Xue He came to him in the Nine Extremes Void.

......

Nine Extremes Void.

"Brother Ye Tian, you should have seen the mission of the Lord of the Ancient Realm, and you want to collect Liuhu Gold to obtain Nine Pole Points, right?" Xue He asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "Does Brother Xuehe know where there is Liuhu Gold?"

"Yes!" Xue He nodded, "But I don't recommend you go there, it's too dangerous there." Even if you truly complete the Eternal Dao Realm, if you go there, there is a possibility of falling. "

"Where?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Demon Seed Abyss!" Xue He said.

"Demon Seed Abyss, what kind of place is that?" Ye Tian asked.

Xue He said: "The Demon Seed Abyss is a forbidden place, the Ancient Kingdom and dozens of surrounding countries are suppressing and blocking the Demon Seed Abyss, as for his origin, say it, you are afraid that you have some heart palpitations, he is actually those who have incomplete cultivation or inferior Eternal Dao Seeds, and the result is too flawed, and there is no way to suppress the consequences in the past endless years, and finally they are eaten by the Eternal Dao Seeds, and these Eternal Dao Realms finally become Eternal Demon Seeds!"

"What?Eternal Demon Seed?Is it so dangerous to cultivate the Eternal Dao Seed?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes!" Xue He sighed with emotion: "Since the Eternal Dao Seed can make us have incomparably strong strength, it will also lead us to a desperate situation! But even if we know the consequences and give the inferior demon seed inheritance, there will still be many Eternal Dao Realms who are willing to cultivate, and only by mastering the strength can we have a higher status and power." No one wants to be an ant to be slaughtered at will. Of course, even if the inferior Eternal Dao Seed is very flawed, if it is really uncontrollable, it can self-destruct the Eternal Dao Seed, and it will not be affected by the Eternal Dao Seed. It's just that if you do this, you will never be able to cultivate into the Eternal Dao Rank again, and you will even be extremely weak, and your combat power will not be as good as that of an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm. "

"Even if there is no Eternal Dao Realm willingness!" Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!" Xue He nodded, "No one wants to make their strength countless times weaker at once, they will all gamble, but in the end, they can't stand it, the Eternal Dao Seed will become demonized, and they will become an irrational killing Eternal Demon Seed." For example, the Ancient Demon Lord, he cultivated the medium eternal demon seed, but he had lived too long, and now he was very close to the eternal demon seed, so he constantly needed to collect the Liuhu gold, and the Liuhu gold could suppress his eternal Dao seed problem. If there is enough Liuhu gold, he will never have a problem. "

"Isn't there a way to completely solve the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed?" Ye Tian asked.

"Of course there is a way!" Xue Dao said: "For example, if you cultivate a perfect-level Dao Seed, but you have the existence of a Perfect-level Dao Seed, you won't take out the Perfect-level Dao Seed at all, and the second way is to transcend the Eternal Dao Realm, then you can completely control the Eternal Dao Seed, even the most rubbish Eternal Dao Seed, you can't demonize yourself." "

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

Xue He said again: "You don't have to worry too much, basically if the Eternal Dao Body is transformed, even if it is a second-class Eternal Dao Species, you don't have to worry about the Eternal Dao Species, the higher the Eternal Dao Body Transformation Realm, or those Eternal Dao Dao Realms that have directly completed the Eternal Dao Body, you need to worry about this problem." "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

In fact, he wasn't worried at all, after all, what he cultivated was a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed!

"It seems that the secret of the perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed can't be said, otherwise a group of terrifying beings will come to snatch my Eternal Dao Seed inheritance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
